hooks.command: jq -e '.stop_hook_active == true' >/dev/null 2>&1 && exit 0; [ -n "$(git status --porcelain -- ':!.claude' 2>/dev/null)" ] || exit 0; jq -n '{decision:"block", reason:"Uncommitted source changes present. Before finishing, run an adversarial review on the working diff and resolve any BLOCK verdict. If already reviewed, you may stop."}'
